members.label: chair
members.description: dark leather reclining armchair near right window
members.long_form_open_description: Single dark-brown leather recliner positioned to the right side of the living room close to a window. Plush padded cushions and visible reclining seams; sits on the carpet near a small wooden end table.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: To the left of the window and just right of the fireplace; adjacent to a small wooden side cabinet
